problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Forward. Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
